revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] [[Category:qq]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[co:commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[co:commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23573030467|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[co:commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template display|badmobile}} {{Lua|Module:Random slideshow}} This template creates a slideshow [[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] with a randomised order – i.e. it changes when the page is purged. '''It is intended for use in portals''' and will not display in article space. == Usage == As many images and captions as desired may be specified, in the following format: {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | second image | second caption | third image | third caption }} Credits (e.g. "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]") may be specified, using the following format {{Random slideshow | First image | first caption | credit1= | second image | second caption | credit2= | third image | third caption | credit3= }} ===Parameters=== ;{{para|1}}, {{para|3}}, {{para|5}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :File name. The "File:" prefix is optional. ;{{para|2}}, {{para|4}}, {{para|6}}, ... {{resize|(or equivalent positional parameters)}} :Caption for the file. ;{{para|credit1}}, {{para|credit2}}, {{para|credit3}}, ... :Credits for the file. Optional. ;{{para|width}} :Maximum width for all images; default is 100% (intended for use inside portal components) :Can be specified as a % (e.g. 75%), or in ems (e.g. 30em), or in px (e.g. 200px) :If a unit is not specified, px is assumed (i.e. 350 is equivalent to 350px) ;{{para|random}} :Set to no or false to turn off the randomisation. ==Display in the mobile view== On mobile devices, a standard gallery is displayed instead of the slideshow. If the screen width is less than 720px, only the first four images after randomisation are visible ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_375x800.png|example screenshot]]). For mobile devices with larger resolutions, all images are displayed ([[:File:Israel_portal_mobile_800x920.png|example screenshot]]). For some tables, it displays all images stacked ([[:File:Mobile view problem climate change.png|example screenshot]]). ==Examples== {{Purge|Purge this page}} to see these galleries in a different order ===Cats=== {{Box-header|title=Selected pictures}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
{{Box-header|title=Selected pictures|EDIT=yes}} {{Random slideshow | File:Cat playing with a lizard.jpg | Cat playing with a lizard | Felis silvestris catus lying on rice straw.jpg | Cat lying on rice straw | Mumbai 03-2016 63 Dhobi Talao Chowk.jpg | Cats in Mumbai | File:Felis catus-cat on snow.jpg | Cat on snow | Tired 20-year-old cat.jpg | Tired cat }} {{Box-footer}}
===Mice=== {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[c:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit2= Photograph: [[de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit4= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} {{Random slideshow | width=275 | File:Agouti Mice.jpg | Two mice | credit1= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff | Brown mouse.jpg | Brown mouse | credit2= Photograph: [[User:Kulmalukko|Tiia Monto]] | File:Farbmaeuse.jpg | Mice with food | credit3= Photograph: [[co:commons:User:Whitesky~commonswiki|Whitesky]] | File:Farbmaus.JPG | Mouse on a wheel | credit4= Photograph: [[w:de:User:R2Dine|R2Dine]] | White lab mouse in hand B.jpg | A mouse in the hand is worth two in the bush | credit5= Photograph: Pogrebnoj-Alexandroff }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Image 1", "description": "Name of the first image, without prefix", "example": "Portal puzzle.svg, 1=Portal puzzle.svg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 1", "description": "Caption of the first image", "example": "2=This is the default portal icon", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter" ], "label": "Image 2", "description": "Name of the second image, without prefix", "example": "Brown mouse.jpg, 3=Brown mouse.jpg", "type": "wiki-file-name", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "4": { "aliases": [ "(unnamed positional parameter)" ], "label": "Caption 2", "description": "Caption of the second image", "example": "4=This is a brown mouse", "type": "string", "default": "(empty)", "suggested": true }, "width": { "label": "Width", "description": "Maximum width of all images", "example": "width=80px, width=30em, width=50%", "type": "number", "default": "(none)", "suggested": true }, "credit1": { "label": "Credit 1", "description": "Credit for the first image", "example": "Photograph: [[User:Example|Example]]" }, "credit2": { "label": "Credit 2", "description": "Credits for the second image", "example": "Photographer: [[User:Example|Example]]" } }, "description": "Creates a slideshow gallery with randomized order. Add as many images as desired.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "credit1", "width", "3", "4", "credit2" ], "format": "block" } {{Portal templates navbox}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Image formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
